data_description.api_type: Select which API to use: iQua for legacy devices or iQua2 for newer devices

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your iQua app credentials.

error.no_devices: No devices were found on this iQua account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or check the logs for more details.
